title: [seocho] Add task-context trail inspection command

title: bug: pre-commit bd flush fails in initialized workspace
description: pre-commit hook runs bd sync --flush-only and fails with direct mode init error despite .beads/beads.db existing. Investigate workspace/prefix detection mismatch.

title: feat: add datatype/enum/range constraint mapping for DozerDB export
description: Extend /rules/export/cypher mapping beyond required rules; support enforceable checks or fallback validation hooks for datatype, enum, and range rules.

description: Keep daemon/sqlite runtime files out of tracked git state and document expected ignored paths.

title: feat: ontology-first SDK refactor
description:
## Goal
Reshape seocho/ SDK package with Ontology as the first-class primitive that drives both graph construction (extraction/indexing) and querying via system/dynamic prompts.

## Key deliverables
- seocho/ontology.py — Ontology, NodeDef, RelDef, P builder API
- seocho/prompt_strategy.py — ExtractionStrategy, QueryStrategy, LinkingStrategy
- seocho/graph_store.py — GraphStore abstraction over Neo4j/DozerDB
- seocho/llm_backend.py — Pluggable LLM backend
- Updated seocho/client.py — local engine mode + ontology param
- Updated exports and backward compat

## Collaboration Context
- Severity: high
- Impact: high
- Urgency: this_sprint
- Sprint: 2026-S03
- Roadmap: platform-workflow
- Area: backend
close_reason: Ontology-first SDK with JSON-LD storage, SHACL validation, and denormalization support pushed to main (5940068)
